title.en: China-to-Chile EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入智利：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入智利：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Chile SEC electrical-safety, installation, connector, grid, EMC, and IEC-based charging-system expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与智利 SEC 电气安全、安装、接口、电网、EMC 以及 IEC 充电系统要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與智利 SEC 電氣安全、安裝、接口、電網、EMC 以及 IEC 充電系統要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SEC product-scope determination, Chilean electrical-installation declaration, utility interconnection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, project owners, operators, and installers should verify current Chile SEC, Ministry of Energy, distribution-company, IEC, and local electrical requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, sale, installation, or operation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SEC产品适用范围裁定、智利电气安装申报、配电公司接入批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、项目业主、运营商和安装方在出货、销售、安装或运营前，应与合格专业人士核验现行智利SEC、能源部、配电公司、IEC及当地电气要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SEC產品適用範圍裁定、智利電氣安裝申報、配電公司接入批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、項目業主、營運商和安裝方在出貨、銷售、安裝或營運前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行智利SEC、能源部、配電公司、IEC及當地電氣要求。

answer_first.en: For EV chargers exported from China to Chile, do not assume that a China GB/T test report or GB/T connector makes the charger ready for Chile. SEC product certification is scope-dependent and should be checked against Chile's current product protocol lists; installed charging infrastructure also needs Chilean electrical-installation compliance, grid acceptance where applicable, and IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 alignment instead of a China-only GB/T 18487 and GB/T 20234 design.
answer_first.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩出口智利时，不能假定中国GB/T测试报告或GB/T接口即可满足智利要求。SEC产品认证是否适用取决于产品范围，应按智利现行产品协议清单核查；已安装的充电基础设施还需要符合智利电气安装要求、适用时满足电网接入，并按IEC 61851 / IEC 62196路线处理，而不是仅采用中国GB/T 18487和GB/T 20234设计。
answer_first.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁出口智利時，不能假定中國GB/T測試報告或GB/T接口即可滿足智利要求。SEC產品認證是否適用取決於產品範圍，應按智利現行產品協議清單核查；已安裝的充電基礎設施還需要符合智利電氣安裝要求、適用時滿足電網接入，並按IEC 61851 / IEC 62196路線處理，而不是僅採用中國GB/T 18487和GB/T 20234設計。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, ministry, grid or distribution utility, electrical-installation authority, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
